title: 029 - ORES Electricity and Gas - Smart Meter Communicability Rate (ORES)
description:
[Publisher: ORES] Name of the report: Ratio of communication capability of smart meters
Aggregation level: The dataset contains aggregated information at monthly level.
Scope: Indicator concerning all smart meters connected to the Telekom network and all smart meters in flight mode. Photo at the end of the month.
Energy: Electricity and gas
Frequency: monthly
End date of the record: not determined
Date of provision of the dataset: 20/mm/NN, on the 20th of the month
Rate of communication ability: Share of unexposed provisioned communicating smart meters in relation to the number of unexposed provisioned smart meters
Provisioned numerator: Smart meter that could be added to the communication chain
Discontinued counter: Smart meters whose services are exposed in the communication chain.
This term may be temporary or definitive.
Smart meters:
digital low-voltage counter, non-mechanical counter


Antenna disabled (flight mode): At the request of the customer, ORES deactivates the communication function of the smart meter. These meters become non-communicating smart meters.
